title: Display apparatus, image processing apparatus and control method for selecting and displaying related image content of primary image content
abstract: There is provided an image processing apparatus which comprises a receiver which receives primary image content; a communicator which communicates with at least one supply source which supplies related image content of the primary image content; a signal processor which processes and outputs the primary image content; and a controller which controls the communicator to request the supply source to supply the related image content, and controls the signal processor to process and play the related image content supplied from the supply source in response to the request if a user selects a key to play the related image content of the primary image content while the primary image content received by the receiver is processed by the signal processor.
claims: 1. An electronic apparatus comprising: a receiver; a communicator; a user input unit configured to receive a user input; and at least one processor configured to: display a broadcast content received through the receiver on a display, the broadcast content corresponding to a selected channel which is selected by a user, based on a first user input being received while the broadcast content is being displayed, receive data corresponding to the displayed broadcast content through the communicator, display a user interface (UI) of a list including a plurality of related contents with the broadcast content on the display based on the received data without searching related content of the displayed broadcast content by the user, and based on a second user input being received to select one of the plurality of related contents, receive the one of the plurality of related contents through the communicator, and display the one of the plurality of related contents on the display.
